Rule writeback applies 599 patches and recovers 60.2% of Fast miss (197.36s unique miss seconds).

LLM review has 4 cases, blocks timeline writeback 0, and blocks memory update 4 at arrival 46.10s.
Voiceprint gate has 620/620 clean patches with voiceprint, 226 high bucket, 138 high rule-auto, and 0 LLM candidates.
